Company_Name: The name of the company. In this case it's Lee's Market.
PR_Team_Lead: The person leading the public relations team. For Lee's Market, it's Andrew Park.
Monitoring_Month_Year: The month and year when the media monitoring service was used. For Lee's Market, it was in February 2023.
News_Sources_Tracked: The number of news sources globally that the monitoring service tracked. In the case of Lee's Market, over 50,000 news sources were tracked.
Average_Daily_Mentions: The average number of times the company's name is mentioned in the news daily. Lee's Market was mentioned an average of 85 times daily.
